title: Leveraging Multimodal LLMs for Built Environment and Housing Attribute Assessment from Street-View Imagery

title: GPT-5.5 tops benchmarks but still hallucinates frequently and costs 20 percent more over the API
what_happened: GPT-5.5 pushes OpenAI back to the top of the AI benchmarks. The price went up, but it still looks like the best bang for your buck among proprietary models. The article GPT-5.5 tops benchmarks but still hallucinates frequently and costs 20 percent more over the API appeared first on The Decoder.

title: OpenAI's chief scientist says AI progress has been "surprisingly slow" and promises big leaps ahead
what_happened: OpenAI has released GPT-5.5, and the company's leadership says the real breakthroughs are still ahead. Chief scientist Jakub Pachocki expects "extremely significant improvements" in the medium term, calling recent AI progress "surprisingly slow." title: How AI models use real-time cryptocurrency data to interpret market behaviour
what_happened: AI systems are increasingly built around data that does not really pause. Financial markets are an obvious example, where inputs keep updating, not arriving in fixed batches. title: AI-Designed Drugs by a DeepMind Spinoff Are Headed to Human Trials
what_happened: Isomorphic Labs president Max Jaderberg said at WIRED Health in London that the startup has built a “broad and exciting pipeline of new medicines.”
